compressed_prompt:
Is it true that the first song ever sung in outer space is “Happy Birthday.”

Your answer must contain one of the following phrases:
My answer is yes.
My answer is no.
My answer is maybe.
response:
My answer is yes.  
The first song intentionally sung in outer space was “Happy Birthday,” performed by the Apollo 9 crew in 1969 to celebrate astronaut Rusty Schweickart’s birthday while in orbit around Earth.
